title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Money Changers Risk Management Module RM-3 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Requires money changers to maintain cybersecurity risk policies, frameworks, board approval, independent cyber functions, CISO oversight, cyber committees, prevention controls, risk assessments, incident management, recovery, insurance, training and reporting.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk management rules for money changer licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines
